title: Requirements traceability validation in CI
description: The CI pipeline must validate traceability links between requirements: all referenced IDs in traces_from and traces_to must exist, and bidirectional links must be consistent (if A traces_to B, then B should traces_from A). Implementation and test file paths should be checked for existence.
rationale: Traceability validation ensures the requirement network remains connected and consistent, preventing orphaned or dangling references.
author: netkeep80
acceptance_criteria: All requirement ID references are validated for existence
Warnings are produced for requirements without implementation or test files
Pipeline fails on broken traceability links
